title: polystichum fragrans
intro: Polystichum fragrans, also known as the Fragrant Lady Fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Polystichum fragrans include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and even alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Polystichum fragrans can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional before consumption.
